code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    mut in_num = false
    mut neg = false
    mut acc = 0
    while i <= n
      mut b = 32
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          b = v
        when None
          b = 32
        end
      end
      let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if is_space
        if in_num
          let signed = if neg
            0 - acc
          else
            acc
          end
          let sq = signed * signed
          if first
            out = "#{sq}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{sq}"
          end
          in_num = false
          neg = false
          acc = 0
        end
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        in_num = true
        neg = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        in_num = true
        acc = acc * 10 + (b - 48)
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
